title: Bergen Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Bergen, with a Z-Score of -3.43. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. The city is experiencing a significant increase in heating degree days (HDD) with a value of 13.0 GG.
 The relative humidity is at 83%, and the wind speed is moderate at 6.1 km/h. There are no cooling degree days (CDD) recorded, indicating no need for cooling.
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with temperatures remaining low for an extended period.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
